name: Chocolate Roll
recipeIngredient: Soft Chocolate Frosting/Filling or sweetened whipped cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the eggs, placing the yolks in one bowl and the whites in another.
2. In a large bowl, beat the egg whites until soft peaks form.
3. Gradually add sugar to the beaten egg whites, continuing to beat until stiff peaks form.
4. Beat the egg yolks in a separate bowl until thickened.
5. Gently fold the yolk mixture into the beaten egg white mixture, alternating with the sifted cocoa.
6. Grease a jelly roll pan and line it with wax paper.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
8. Remove from the oven and invert the pan onto a towel dusted with sifted cocoa or powdered sugar.
9. Roll up the cake tightly, sealing the ends.
10. Allow to cool completely before unrolling.
11. Spread chocolate frosting/filling or whipped cream over the cooled roll.
12. Re-roll the cooled cake for serving.
